altText: A small dogwood tree covered in white flowers in the spring forest.
Two white dogwood flowers with four big petals and yellow centers.
A dogwood branch full of white four petal flowers.
A big white dogwood flower with four petals and a yellow middle.
Lots of white dogwood flowers covering the branches.
Up close you can see the tiny real flowers in the middle of the white petals.
Shiny red dogwood berries sitting on colorful fall leaves.
Two red dogwood berries growing above a green leaf.
Oval dogwood leaves turning red and green in the fall.
